data.title: Price of HOLO token moving towards $0.08 resistance amidst recent momentum; potential for further upward movement.
data.description: Traders are closely monitoring HOLO's price action as the token nears important resistance levels. Technical analysis indicates a possibility of further upward movement if current trends persist.

data.title: NMHC Joins HUD Secretary Turner and Congressman Evans in Tour of Build-to-Rent Community
data.description: In Washington, the President of the National Multifamily Housing Council (NMHC) Sharon Wilson Géno, along with NMHC Members Jared Ford and Josh Hartmann, joined HUD Secretary Scott Turner and Congressman Gabe Evans on a visit to a Build-to-Rent (BTR) community in Colorado. The tour aimed to highlight the importance of BTR homes in addressing the housing affordability crisis faced by families nationwide. Build-to-Rent properties provide a tangible and prompt resolution to the pressing issue of finding affordable housing.

data.title: PERFECT GAME PARTNERS WITH THREE MLB CLUBS TO OFFER EXCLUSIVE TICKET DISCOUNTS FOR YOUTH TEAMS
data.description: Today in Sanford, Florida, Perfect Game, the leading youth baseball and softball platform and scouting service, revealed a new fan involvement effort with support from three Major League Baseball teams: the Kansas City Royals, Houston Astros, and St. Louis Cardinals. This initiative aims to enhance the experience for the estimated 500,000 fans who attend Perfect Game events annually.

data.title: XGS Energy and CC Power Partner on 115 MW Next-Generation Geothermal Development Agreement
data.description: XGS Energy and CC Power in Sacramento, California, have entered a GEODE Agreement to facilitate the creation of 115 megawatts of cutting-edge geothermal energy in the state.

data.title: FCC Names ioXt Alliance Lead Administrator for U.S. Cyber Trust Mark Program
data.description: In Los Angeles, the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) has appointed the ioXt Alliance as the Lead Administrator for the US Cyber Trust Mark program. This national initiative aims to boost the cybersecurity of consumer IoT devices. The ioXt Alliance, known as the Global Standard for IoT Security, has been selected for its efforts in promoting practical and globally aligned IoT security standards. This designation highlights the organization's commitment to enhancing cybersecurity.

data.title: Bitcoin shorts at risk above $70K as ‘90% of downside’ completed; data shows BTC undervalued with high liquidation risk.
data.description: Data on Bitcoin's price indicates that the cryptocurrency is still undervalued. Short positions placed above the $70,000 mark carry a significant risk of being liquidated due to this undervaluation.

data.title: 2027 Rand McNally Road Atlas Launches Today, Highlighting 'Destination Dupes' and the Spontaneous Joy of the Open Road
data.description: Today, in Chicago on April 13, 2026, Rand McNally Publishing unveiled its 2027 Road Atlas, marking the 103rd edition of the renowned publication. For over 170 years, Rand McNally has been the leading provider of maps and navigation. The latest edition highlights the emerging "destination dupe" travel trend.

data.title: Jito and KODA join forces for institutional staking in South Korea, bringing regulated custody and staking for JitoSOL amid new crypto regulations.
data.description: In an effort to comply with new crypto regulations, a partnership has been forged to offer controlled custody and staking services for JitoSOL in South Korea. This collaboration targets institutions in the country, with the goal of providing them with secure and regulated options for cryptocurrency management. This move comes as South Korea prepares to implement new rules governing the crypto industry.

data.title: Delaware Car Accident Procedures Explained in HelloNation Featuring Trial Attorney Keith E. Donovan of Wilmington, Delaware
data.description: The publication details a comprehensive guide on safeguarding safety, handling insurance claims, and asserting legal rights following a car accident in Delaware. On April 13, 2026, in WILMINGTON, Del., the article highlights crucial steps for drivers to take directly following a collision in Delaware to ensure the preservation of their well-being and financial stability.

data.title: Final qualifiers for the Games of the Future 2026 set for Astana this June
data.description: Elite teams from around the world will gather at the Phygital Contenders 2026 event in Astana to compete for coveted spots at the world's cutting-edge sporting event that combines physical sports with competitive gaming. Scheduled to take place in Dubai, UAE on April 13, 2026, this event marks the pinnacle of innovation in sports where participants will battle for their chance to participate in the Games of the future.

data.title: Crypto exchange Kraken refuses to negotiate with criminals extorting over stolen customer data.
data.description: Kraken, a popular cryptocurrency exchange, has reported being targeted for extortion due to stolen customer data. Despite the threats, the exchange has refused to comply with the demands of the criminals and is not engaging in negotiations. This incident has raised concerns within the crypto community as the exchange deals with safeguarding sensitive information of over 4 million users. Kraken's firm stance against yielding to the extortionists highlights the importance of maintaining data security and protecting customer privacy in the digital age.
Cloudflare Rallies As Agent Cloud Push Signals AI-First Future

data.title: Circle Won't Freeze Stolen USDC Without Court Order, CEO Points Out
data.description: Jeremy Allaire, CEO of Circle Internet (NASDAQ: CRCL), announced that the company implements a Court-Order-Only Policy when it comes to freezing USDC wallets. Allaire stated that Circle only takes such action when directed by law enforcement or courts. This declaration led to a 9% surge in shares. During a press conference in Seoul, Allaire emphasized that USDC is considered a regulated financial product, not a tool for immediate intervention in hacking situations. He highlighted that Circle strictly adheres to legal processes and refrains from independent decisions to freeze wallets in the event of an exploit; they wait for formal requests from authorities. In contrast, rival Tether, issuer of the largest stablecoin (CRYPTO: USDT), has a more proactive approach by freezing funds related to hacks within hours. Tether differs significantly in its handling of such situations compared to Circle.

data.title: AHF, UNITE Convene High-level Roundtable on Health Financing during IMF/World Bank Spring Meetings
data.description: In Washington, the AIDS Healthcare Foundation (AHF) Global Public Health Institute and UNITE Parliamentarians Network for Global Health are set to host a high-level parliamentary roundtable dialogue titled Financing Health Equity and Security on April 14. The event will run concurrently with the 2026 Spring Meetings of the International Monetary Fund and World Bank Group and will serve as a breakfast side event. This important gathering will bring together parliamentarians, global health leaders, and key stakeholders to discuss crucial topics.

data.title: 'ECHL Unfiltered: South Carolina Stingrays' Earns Regional Emmy® Nomination
data.description: GameAbove Entertainment's recent release of the hockey docuseries, ECHL Unfiltered: South Carolina Stingrays, indicates a growing interest in high-quality sports narratives. The latest installment, produced by GameAbove Entertainment, has caught the attention of viewers. The docuseries provides an in-depth look at the South Carolina Stingrays and their journey. This signals a surge in demand for premium sports storytelling. The release took place on April 13, 2026, in Fort Myers, Florida. With a focus on access and exclusive behind-the-scenes content, the docuseries offers viewers a unique perspective on the team. This reflects a shift towards more immersive and engaging sports content.
